title: Crying Mobs
description: This mod adds crying for you and mobs!
body:
## Ever felt like Minecraft combat was missing something?
# Well, now it has tears.

**Crying Mobs** adds an emotional layer to your violence — when you hit a mob,
there's a chance it will start crying, with water droplets streaming down its
face for anywhere between **15 seconds and 4 minutes.**

Every mob has feelings. You just never cared enough to notice.

---

But deep down, you're not a bad person. That's why we added the **Lollipop** —
a craftable item that, when used on a crying mob, instantly consoles them.
Hearts appear, a soft chime plays, and peace is restored.

**Until you hit them again.**

You can also just... eat it. Nobody's judging.

**Craft a Lollipop:** *Sugar + Flint and Steel + Stick.*
Your flint and steel loses durability — comforting others comes at a cost.

![How to craft lollipop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/023b977213b89ecffc88af57993e6a2600cf1789.png)

---

## Advancements

The mod comes with four advancements, because your crimes deserve to be
documented.

| Advancement | How |
|---|---|
| 🍭 **The Candy Man** | Get a Lollipop in your inventory |
| 🕊️ **Peacekeeper** | Use a Lollipop on a crying mob |
| 😋 **Sweet Tooth** | Eat the Lollipop yourself instead |
| ☠️ **Mixed Signals** | Kill a mob while holding a Lollipop |

*Mixed Signals* is the most honest one.
